No CHANGELOG.md — version history not documented
package.json missing repository field — provenance attestation won't link to source
No SECURITY.md — users don't know how to report vulnerabilities
No CODEOWNERS file — no mandatory reviewers for critical paths
No CONTRIBUTING.md — onboarding is harder for new contributors
No pre-commit hooks (husky/lefthook) — lint/format not enforced before commit
No Dependabot/Renovate — dependency updates are manual and often forgotten
No linter config (ESLint/Biome/dart analyze) — code style not enforced
No formatter config (Prettier/Biome/.editorconfig) — inconsistent code formatting
No test coverage configuration — coverage thresholds not enforced
No commit convention enforcement (commitlint/changesets) — changelog generation is manual

assessment.patternDescription: Two-tier — main code + one sub-package (e.g., src + lib).
insights: Clean layering — dependencies flow in one direction without violations.
No god modules — healthy dependency distribution.

details.reason: Set VCQA_PRO_KEY to enable dead pattern detection
details.description: Detects leftover code from incomplete refactors: fallback paths, parallel implementations, dead guards, hardcoded feature flags. Produces a Feature Map of your codebase.

details.reason: Set VCQA_PRO_KEY to enable test audit
details.description: Detects fake and shallow tests: empty test bodies, trivial assertions, tautologies, mock-heavy tests, and tests whose names don't match what they actually verify.

details.reason: Set VCQA_PRO_KEY to enable file cohesion analysis
details.description: Detects files with multiple responsibilities — the #1 code smell in AI-generated code. Labels each file's concern clusters and suggests concrete split points.

details.reason: Set VCQA_PRO_KEY to enable design consistency analysis
details.description: LLM-powered audit of visual consistency — finds components with duplicate styling, inconsistent spacing scales, and missing component extraction opportunities.
